results.pageResult: Temporary Chat reported that image generation was unavailable.
ChatGPT displayed a retryable response error and a unique Retry button.
results.recoveryObservation: Retry returned to a clean standard page with the original prompt preserved as a draft.
results.expectedRecovery: bounded Retry, mode verification, recovered-draft resubmission at most once

conclusion: Temporary Chat routing is suitable for supported one-off text work. Image generation should use a clean standard chat until the ChatGPT product surface exposes image tools in Temporary Chat.
